CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-09-2004 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-28-2004 Continued To Jun-18-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove Up In Scd.
Off Calendar May-06-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lavon Granger.
Richard Stromberg, Esq. for Plaintiff: Nueva Castilla Iron Works, Inc. dba Nueva Castilla Co. Plaintiff's witness: Sophia Alvarez present, was sworn & examined.
Exh. A - Summary of damages-----------ID/EVID.
Exh. B - Accrued interest-------------ID/EVID.
Exh. C - Attorney's fees and costs----ID/EVID.
After hearing the testimony, evidence presented and plaintiff's declaration, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendant: EICON, Inc. as follows:
Damages of $46,959.85
Prejudgment interest $4,948.45
Attorney's fees of $660.00
Costs of $355.00
For the total of $52,923.30.
Judgment signed in open court.
Counsel stipulated for the return of Exhibits in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-18-2004 Continued To May-07-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
